search_document:
User Request: Products per supplier.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Products per Supplier
Type: chart
Description: Distribution of products across suppliers
Title: Supplier Overview
Type: table
Description: List of suppliers with product counts
Title: Total Products
Type: kpi
Description: Total number of products available

sql_queries.title: Products per Supplier
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s.CompanyName, COUNT(p.ProductID) AS ProductCount FROM Suppliers s LEFT JOIN Products p ON s.SupplierID = p.SupplierID GROUP BY s.CompanyName ORDER BY ProductCount DESC

sql_queries.title: Supplier Overview
sql_queries.description: List of suppliers with product counts
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s.SupplierID, s.CompanyName, s.ContactTitle, s.City, s.Region, s.PostalCode, s.Country, COUNT(p.ProductID) AS ProductCount FROM Suppliers s LEFT JOIN Products p ON s.SupplierID = p.SupplierID GROUP BY s.SupplierID, s.CompanyName, s.ContactTitle, s.City, s.Region, s.PostalCode, s.Country ORDER BY s.CompanyName

sql_queries.title: Total Products
sql_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(ProductID) AS TotalProducts FROM Products
